items.headline: Avdija gets tough basket plus foul to seal Trail Blazers’ play-in win
items.blurb: Avdija gets tough basket plus foul to seal Trail Blazers’ play-in win — Watch as Deni Avdija drives to the basket and gets the tough bucket to fall, plus the foul to give the Trail Blazers the go-ahead lead in the final 20 seconds of the game.

items.headline: Deni Avdija's monster effort lifts Trail Blazers to play-in win, seven seed
items.blurb: Deni Avdija's monster effort lifts Trail Blazers to play-in win, seven seed — Even after he made his first All-Star appearance this season, many NBA fans aren't familiar with Deni Avdija. After he carried the Portland Trail Blazers to a play-in win, that should no longer be the case.

items.headline: Gotta See It: Ball sinks go-ahead basket as Hornets survive wild sequence
items.blurb: Gotta See It: Ball sinks go-ahead basket as Hornets survive wild sequence — Watch as LaMelo Ball turns the corner and gets the go-ahead layup to fall, while Davion Mitchell tries to reply but gets blocked by Miles Bridges in a wild sequence as the Hornets hold on to win their first play-in game against the Heat.

items.blurb: Heat’s Adebayo takes hard fall after trip from Hornets’ Ball — Miami Heat’s centre Bam Adebayo exited the Play-In game against the Charlotte Hornets after suffering an apparent lower back injury and is questionable to return.

items.blurb: 2026 NBA Draft Set For Two Nights Beginning Tuesday June 23 — The NBA has scheduled the 2026 NBA draft for Tuesday, June 23rd and Wednesday June 24th. Both nights will be televised by ESPN and begin at 8 p.m. ET. The NBA draft lottery is scheduled for Sunday, May 10th. items.headline: Jalen Green: Goes for 35 points in loss
items.blurb: Jalen Green: Goes for 35 points in loss — Green finished with 35 points (14-29 FG, 2-7 3Pt, 5-6 FT), five rebounds, two assists and one block across 35 minutes in Tuesday's 114-110 loss to the Trail Blazers in the Play-In Tournament. Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.

items.blurb: Deni Avdija: Erupts for 41 points in win — Avdija posted 41 points (15-22 FG, 3-8 3Pt, 8-13 FT), 12 assists, seven rebounds and two blocks across 38 minutes in Tuesday's 114-110 Play-In Tournament win over the Suns. Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.

items.blurb: Tyrese Haliburton Dealing With Shingles — Indiana Pacers guard Tyrese Haliburton was feeling good with his return from the torn Achilles' tendon he suffered in last year's NBA Finals. Unfortunately, Haliburton is now battling a case of shingles, which has caused him pain, itching and to gain weight. items.headline: Michael Porter Jr Hopes To Extend With Nets
items.blurb: Michael Porter Jr Hopes To Extend With Nets — The Brooklyn Nets are rebuilding, but if Michael Porter Jr. has his way, he'll be a part of whatever comes next. Porter is entering the final year of his contract, and would like to extend or re-sign with the Nets. "If it was up to me, I'd love to sign an extension with this franchise," said Porter. items.headline: Davion Mitchell: Full stat line in loss
items.blurb: Davion Mitchell: Full stat line in loss — Mitchell amassed 28 points (12-24 FG, 4-9 3Pt), six assists, four rebounds, two steals and one block across 48 minutes in Tuesday's 127-126 overtime loss to the Hornets in the Play-In Tournament. Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.

items.headline: LaMelo Ball: Drops 30 points in win
items.blurb: LaMelo Ball: Drops 30 points in win — Ball contributed 30 points (12-31 FG, 2-16 3Pt, 4-4 FT), 10 assists, five rebounds, one steal and one block across 40 minutes in Tuesday's 127-126 overtime win over the Heat in the Play-In Tournament. Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.

items.headline: Steve Kerr Wants To Return Next Season Despite Unresolved Contract
items.blurb: Steve Kerr Wants To Return Next Season Despite Unresolved Contract — Steve Kerr wants to remain the Golden State Warriors' head coach, but his future with the franchise is unresolved as his contract expires at the end of this season. items.headline: Bam Adebayo: Won't return Tuesday
items.blurb: Bam Adebayo: Won't return Tuesday — Adebayo (back) won't return to Tuesday's Play-In Tournament game against the Hornets. He'll finish with six points (3-3 FG), three rebounds, one assist and one steal across 11 minutes. Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.

items.headline: Dylan Mingo Decommits From North Carolina
items.blurb: Dylan Mingo Decommits From North Carolina — Five-star prospect Dylan Mingo decommitted from North Carolina on Monday. Mingo had initially committed to the program under Hubert Davis, who was fired following the season. UNC hired Michael Malone earlier this month. Mingo picked the Tar Heels over Baylor, Penn State and Washington, but he is expected to consider other programs. Mingo is ranked ranked

items.blurb: Caleb Wilson Officially Declares For NBA Draft — Caleb Wilson officially declared for the NBA Draft in a video statement on Monday. "I am grateful for the opportunity I had to represent North Carolina," Wilson said.
